top_signals.title: Oil prices pull back from highs after Trump says Israel and Iran want a ceasefire
top_signals.summary: Oil rises on Monday amid heightened tensions in the Middle East, raising concerns that the conflict may drag on.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China's global e-commerce push stalls as Iran war lifts costs, dampens demand - Reuters
top_signals.summary: China's global e-commerce push stalls as Iran war lifts costs, dampens demand  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Netanyahu’s grand strategy is coming apart
top_signals.summary: The Israeli leader has tried to secure his country by entirely military means. It isn’t working.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Crypto's recovery remains unsecure as SpaceX, Anthropic IPOs loom. Stronger ETF inflows would help.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Consortium to Advance e-Fuel Green Corridor Between Brazil and Belgium
top_signals.summary: A new consortium facilitated by the Global Maritime Forum and RMI will work to establish a green shipping corridor between the Port of Açu in Brazil and the Port of Antwerp-Bruges in Belgium.In addition to the port teams on both ends of the corridor…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Marvell Technology jumps almost 9% in premarket after news it will join the S&P 500 index
top_signals.summary: Marvell rose in premarket trading after S&P Global said the AI chipmaker would join the S&P 500 on June 22.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: USAA to return nearly $1 billion to Florida members as legal reforms help lower insurance costs
top_signals.summary: USAA said it will deliver nearly $1 billion in combined savings and returns to eligible Florida members, including a $500 million dividend, CNBC can exclusively report.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Hands on with Intelligent Terminal, an AI-powered Windows Terminal
top_signals.summary: Microsoft has created an open-source fork of Windows Terminal called "Intelligent Terminal," and it allows you to use AI directly inside Terminal without interfering with the regular session. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
